case_title: ISIDRO A MEJIA VS. MANUEL JIMENEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MEJIA, ISIDRO A AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-09-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTIUED FOR EVERY 6 MONTHS UNTIL 2020. CASE SETTLED THROUGH MEDIATION. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---BESSIE MARINDA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEJIA, ISIDRO A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, MANUEL $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
